data.title: Service-Oriented Architecture
data.description: Instagram uses a microservices-based architecture to handle its vast number of users and features efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Microservices communicate via RESTful APIs, leveraging containerization and orchestration tools like Kubernetes.

data.title: Scalable Data Storage
data.description: Utilizes distributed databases to manage user data effectively and scale out with user growth.
data.technical_spec: Employs storage solutions such as Cassandra and Elasticsearch for reliable and efficient data retrieval.

data.title: CDN for Content Delivery
data.description: Content Delivery Networks are used to minimize latency and improve load times for images and videos.
data.technical_spec: Global CDN providers cache content in strategically located data centers worldwide.

data.title: High Availability Systems
data.description: Redundant systems and failover mechanisms ensure Instagram remains accessible despite server failures.
data.technical_spec: Load balancers and automatic failover systems distribute traffic and manage server health.

data.title: Asynchronous Processing
data.description: Background job processing helps manage high-load tasks without affecting user interaction performance.
data.technical_spec: Technologies like Celery or Amazon SQS handle asynchronous task queues.
